_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-03-11 18:24:35Z)**_

`StorageKeys` is declared with `const` in three files. Since these are classic scripts (not ES modules), all three declarations land in the same global scope. The fix: declare it only in `api-client.js` and remove the duplicate declarations from `state-manager.js` and `ui-core.js`.

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Find variable name conflicts between modules and app.js

```bash
python3 -c "
import re

def get_vars(paths):
    vars = set()
    for p in paths:
        with open(p) as f:
            for line in f:
                m = re.match(r'^(let|const|var) ([a-zA-Z_\$][a-zA-Z0-9_\$]*)', line)
                if m: vars.add(m.group(2))
    return vars

modules = get_vars([
    'web/state-manager.js', 'web/api-client.js',
    'web/utils.js', 'web/ui-core.js'
])
app = get_vars(['web/app.js'])
dupes = modules & app
print('Duplicates:', sorted(dupes))
" 2>&1
```
